name: live-city-sim
description: Live city simulator (realistic, fullscreen). WebGPU + TSL + R3F v9 + React 19 (June 2026). Procedural seeded city, day/night sim clock, instanced traffic.
//versions: three pinned to 0.184.x to match the vendored read-only reference checkout under ./three.js. @types/three tracks the same minor. R3F v9 is React-19 compatible.
//optional: Add only when actually needed: @react-three/drei (loaders, Environment helpers), @react-three/postprocessing (bloom/DOF for night glow). The camera rig is hand-rolled (see ARCHITECTURE.md), so drei is intentionally NOT a dependency yet.
